# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

# cloud-sql-postgres.yaml
# Cloud SQL PostgreSQL Deployment Manager Template - Staging
# NOTE: Uses Cloud SQL Proxy / private IP instead of open network access
#       Password should be changed immediately after deployment

resources:
- name: staging-postgres-instance
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_15
    settings:
      tier: db-custom-2-8192
      dataDiskSizeGb: 20
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        startTime: "03:00"
        pointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        requireSsl: true
        # SECURE: Only allow specific known IPs, not 0.0.0.0/0
        # Replace these with your actual office/VPN/CI-CD IPs
        authorizedNetworks:
        - name: office-vpn
          value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.metadata.REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_VPN_IP)
          # Example: value: 203.0.113.10/32
      databaseFlags:
      - name: log_connections
        value: "on"
      - name: log_disconnections
        value: "on"
      - name: log_statement
        value: "ddl"
    # Password is set here as a placeholder - MUST be rotated after deployment
    # Prefer using: gcloud sql users set-password or Secret Manager
    rootPassword: CHANGE_ME_IMMEDIATELY_AFTER_DEPLOY

- name: staging-database
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:databases
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.name)
    name: staging_db
    charset: UTF8

outputs:
- name: instanceName
  value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.name)
- name: connectionName
  value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.connectionName)
- name: publicIpAddress
  value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.ipAddresses[0].ipAddress)
- name: securityReminder
  value: "ACTION REQUIRED: 1) Rotate the root password via gcloud or Console. 2) Add your specific IPs to authorizedNetworks. 3) Use Cloud SQL Auth Proxy for application connections."
